description: AI agent security via MCP: C3 firewall, C4 immune system, C5 action guard, self-evolving prompts.
name: io.github.gsepcore/gsep-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Anthropic API key (use this OR OPENAI_API_KEY OR OLLAMA_HOST)
environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key (use this OR ANTHROPIC_API_KEY OR OLLAMA_HOST)
environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Ollama server URL for local models (e.g. http://localhost:11434)
environmentVariables.name: OLLAMA_HOST

environmentVariables.description: Intelligence preset: minimal, standard, conscious, or full (default: full)
environmentVariables.name: GSEP_PRESET
